Math

New research, launches, and experiments.
see all
What if video editing had a volume knob?
Text-driven video editing lets you describe what to change. But what about how much? We introduce Adaptive-Origin Guidance (AdaOr), a method that turns edit intensity into a smooth, continuous slider.
Read more
Comcast to Accelerate Next-Generation AI Applications Using NVIDIA Infrastructure at the Network Edge
Comcast today announced a groundbreaking initiative to bring AI processing, using NVIDIA GPUs, closer to customers than ever before to accelerate the development of next-generation AI applications across America.
Read more
Building the AI Grid with NVIDIA: Orchestrating Intelligence Everywhere
AI-native services are exposing a new bottleneck in AI infrastructure: As millions of users, agents, and devices demand access to intelligence, the challenge is shifting from peak training throughput to delivering deterministic inference at scale—predictable latency, jitter, and sustainable token economics.
Read more
Closing the Latency Gap: Decart Is Helping Shape the AI Grid
Decart is collaborating with Comcast to move high-performance inference to the edge powered by Nvidia GPUs – enabling sub-35ms generative AI experiences.
Read more
Oasis: A Universe in a Transformer
Powered by our Oasis video model, your actions shape the environment in real time.
Read more
Why Sequoia’s Shaun Maguire is Betting on a Year-Old AI Video Startup
Sequoia partner Shaun Maguire has risen to prominence over the past year for his friendship with Elon Musk..
Read more
This AI-generated open-world demo may represent the future of real-time video generation
The interactive demo, Oasis, is created from clips and keyboard inputs alone- it stands as the first real-time, interactive, generative AI video model.
Read more
This AI Warps Live Video in Real Time
A startup called Decart has developed an AI model that can transform live footage. The results are mind-bending—and poised to take over streaming.
Read more
MirageLSD: The First Live-Stream Diffusion AI Video Model
MirageLSD is the first system to achieve infinite, real-time video generation with zero latency.
Read more
The startup Decart became profitable within three months
Dr. Dean Leitersdorf and Moshe Shalev succeeded in securing a $21 million seed round from Sequoia and Oren Zeev. (Hebrew)
Read more
Introducing Lucy 2: SOTA realtime world transformation model
Today, we’re releasing Lucy 2.0 — a real-time world transformation model that shifts high-fidelity video editing from offline rendering to live interaction. This opens up an unlimited set of possibilities ranging from character swaps and product placement to high-fidelity real-time data augmentation and simulation for robotics.
Read more
Sequoia-backed Decart raises $21M in Seed funding
The Israeli startup has built an AI infrastructure platform that enhances the efficiency of AI models, offering faster and more reliable training as well as real-time inference.
Read more
Partnering with Decart: The Future of AI-Generated Experiences
A breakthrough in video inference offers a sneak peek at the next frontier.
Read more
Building Living Characters With Decart and ElevenLabs
Decart syncs the lips. ElevenLabs gives them soul. Together, they turn digital avatars into living characters.
Read more
Decart's AI simulates a real-time, playable, open-world demo
Decart, an Israeli AI company that emerged from stealth today with $21 million in funding, has released what it's claiming is the first interactive "open-world" model.
Read more
Decart nabs $32M to build AI tech and ‘open world’ apps
A young startup that emerged from stealth less than two months ago with big-name backers and bigger ambitions is returning to the spotlight.
Read more
'Wow, This Is Happening Fast': Why Elon Musk Is Excited About Game-changing Israeli Startup
Just four months after a giant seed round, Decart has raised another $32 million. Investors – and the gamers community – are drawn to its generative game model.
Read more
Decart raises $100 million at a $3.1 billion valuation
Exclusive: Decart raises $100 million at a $3.1 billion valuation, chasing the future of real-time creative AI

Decart’s New Lucy 2 Generative AI Video Model Pushes Generative Video Into Real Time
